meaning: (苹果公司出产的)强力笔记本电脑
examples: Apple's first truly successful portable computer — the PowerBook — was introduced in 1991.
As you can see in the PIC above the powerbook battery, the number is printed directly on the wrapping.
All the features from the bronze PowerBook remain intact, including last year's industrial design.
Thunderbolt connectors were introduced by Intel for the Apple Powerbook in the Spring of 2011.
